name: Yuksek
description: '''Pierre-Alexandre Busson''' ({{IPA|fr|pjɛʁ alɛksɑ̃dʁ bysɔ̃}}; born 3 June 1977), better known as '''Yuksek''', is a French electronic music producer, remixer, singer and DJ from [[Reims]]. Yüksek means "high" or "loud" in [[Turkish language|Turkish]].{{Relevance inline|date=June 2025}}
